title: quercus × undulata
intro: Quercus × undulata, also known as the Coast Live Oak hybrid, is a deciduous tree that is a cross between the Valley Oak (Quercus lobata) and the Coast Live Oak (Quercus agrifolia). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus × undulata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Quercus × undulata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
